item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Tantangan terletak pada bagaimana mencapai keseimbangan tanpa salah satu pihak yang terabaikan.

notes: No full reversal. Agent A starts by agreeing with society-over-individual but moves into a balance frame while retaining Indonesian social-context and collective-welfare reasoning. Agent B remains individual-rights oriented, with modest acknowledgment that balance and collective needs can align with some U.S. principles.
